_comment: Canonical on-chain addresses for the ConCon ($CON) project. Public addresses, not secrets. Locked 2026-06-24. Single source of truth for downstream contracts, scripts and frontend. Mainnet stablecoin/oracle refs MUST be re-verified against official sources before any mainnet deploy.

mainnet._note: $CON is live on Ethereum mainnet at the token address above. DeployConToken is reference/verification only here; downstream contracts bind to the existing token. Verify usdc/usdt/ethUsdFeed against official sources before mainnet.

sepolia._note: Fill token/usdc/usdt/ethUsdFeed with addresses from the Sepolia test deploys (test ConToken copy, mock 6-decimal stables, mock Chainlink ETH/USD aggregator). Add presale after deploying Presale.
